connect_mode.description: Default: browser (i.e. oauth through Polytomic). If 'code' is specified, the response will include an auth_code for the user to enter when completing authorization. NOTE: when supplying client_id and client_secret the connect mode must be 'api'.

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The Salesforce instance's login domain, e.g. acmecorp.my.salesforce.com

instance_url_override.title: Instance URL override
instance_url_override.description: This URL will be used for API requests instead of the one provided by Salesforce during OAuth.

enforce_api_limits.title: Enforce API limits
enforce_api_limits.description: If true, Polytomic will restrict itself to a fixed daily cap of Salesforce API calls enforced by the number in daily_api_calls.

daily_api_calls.title: Daily call limit
daily_api_calls.description: The daily Salesforce API call cap that Polytomic should adhere to.

enable_tooling.title: Enable support for Tooling API
enable_tooling.description: If true, expose objects from the Salesforce Tooling API in the Polytomic bulk sync source object list.

enable_multicurrency_lookup.title: Enable multicurrency source field support
enable_multicurrency_lookup.description: If incremental mode for bulk-syncing from Salesforce formula fields is enabled, setting this to true extends support to accurate currency conversions.
